answer: Within AMER, $6.1M sits in negotiation-stage deals closing in the next 14 days across 9 opportunities. Of those, 4 opportunities ($2.4M) have had no logged activity in 30 days and are the highest-risk subset. The remaining 5 are actively progressing.

citations.snippet: Filter prior result set to region = AMER and stage = negotiation; intersect with last-activity > 30 days.

recommended_tool.reason: Open the 4 quiet AMER deals to see the last touchpoint and owning rep.

routing_decision.rationale: Refinement narrowed the prior answer post-hoc by region and stage; no new source fan-out was required.
